blended.narrative: Showdown Montana is looking at a significant storm over the next 48 hours, with 18 inches of snowfall of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 4,360 ft. Looking ahead, 24 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 11" of heavy snow, highs of 25°F. Expect powder.
Tomorrow: 8" of snow, highs of 24°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 3.2" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 2.4" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Base has been melting — down 5" over the past week. Current depth: 41".
